libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: No special environment or system properties are needed. Generated tests should target Spring Boot 3.0 APIs rather than reusing removed/changed 2.6 APIs: HttpTrace was replaced by web exchanges APIs, and several endpoint constructors/descriptors changed.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8867 [Automation] javac compile fails for org.springframework.boot:spring-boot-actuator:3.0.0; label=fails-javac-compile; body_chars=8015

risks: The artifact contains optional integration health indicators for systems such as RabbitMQ, Cassandra, and web/reactive stacks; avoid covering those unless the matching client/framework dependency is intentionally added by the test itself.
Existing 2.6.3 tests are not source-compatible with 3.0.0, so compile failures are expected if the generator copies old API usage directly.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: No extra dependency, Docker image, or environment/system property is required for meaningful spring-boot-actuator 3.0.0 coverage; the artifact resolves with only spring-boot as a declared dependency and core actuator endpoints can be exercised in-process.
